Judith Brottrager

Computational Literary Studies

About

I hold bachelor’s degrees in Comparative Literature and English and American Studies (University of Vienna) and a master’s degree in Linguistic and Literary Computing (TU Darmstadt). As a proud member of the DFG Priority Programme “Computational Literary Studies”, I’m currently working on my PhD thesis on issues of canonisation in English and German literary history.

Contact: judith.brottrager(at)tu-darmstadt.de
